viewPurpose: Show the smallest graph slice needed to ask the first safe user question for a future SMART-51 setting change.

selectedNodes.whySelected: Sets product-level behavior context, but remains inferred until user confirmation.
Owns device connection, routing, config, and shared wrapper boundaries.
The requested change family targets SMART-51.
Candidate owner if the setting belongs to the printer body.
Candidate owner if the setting belongs to the laminator.
Candidate owner if the setting belongs to the flipper.
Candidate owner if the setting belongs to MHopper2.
New settings may differ by User, Dealer, or Factory grant.
Potential owner of parameter metadata if the setting maps to a device parameter.
Needed if the setting reads from or writes to hardware.
Needed if the setting must be saved or loaded through config files.

selectedEdges.whySelected: Shows how SMART-51 becomes the active model branch.
Prevents PBE from assuming the setting is available to every build/persona.
Prevents PBE from treating UI changes and device side effects as the same scope.
Prevents PBE from assuming persistence behavior without confirmation.

knownBeforeQuestion: SMART-51 exists as a model branch.
SMART-51 has Printer, Laminator, Flipper, and MHopper2 candidate module routes.
Parameter metadata exists in model/module subdialogs.
unknownBeforeQuestion: Exact setting name or UI label.
Whether the change is UI-only, read-only, write-capable, or read/write.
Whether config save/load should include the setting.

firstUserQuestion.question: What is the exact setting name, UI label, parameter name, or device menu wording for the SMART-51 setting you want to add?
firstUserQuestion.whyNow: Without a setting name or description, PBE cannot safely select the module, expected files, tests, or hardware boundary.

answerTemplate.expectedBehavior: UI only | read from device | write to device | read and write | unknown
